query:
SELECT 
  us.userId,
  us.telegramChatId,
  us.telegramEnabled,
  u.name,
  u.role
FROM userSettings us
JOIN users u ON u.id = us.userId
WHERE us.telegramEnabled = 1
  AND us.telegramChatId IS NOT NULL
  AND us.telegramChatId != ''
  AND us.userId != 1
ORDER BY us.userId;
